title: Ask Anyone be it Shinji or man in the background2
display_title: Ask Anyone be it Shinji or man in the background2
wikitext:
[]: Ask Anyone, be it Shinji or man in the background#2.             Quote Post by LordBlank » Sat Nov 11, 2006 8:55 am As above, ask anyone anything. Ask Shinji why he was let out of the womb too early, ask Asuka would she like fries with that and and many more, if the PRICE IS RIGHT!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sat Nov 11, 2006 9:45 am "Shinji, would you mind keeping these two things in your hands? Thanks! I'll be back in a second!" *Goes to a secret "HIGH VOLTAGE" trigger next room, and pulls it :twisted:* I'd ask Rei if she would mind if I would build a temple in honour of Her, and pray to Her with the other Rei-maniacs... I hope you were not expecting serious questions...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 16, 2006 4:09 pm These are kinda stupid, but here goes: I'd ask Shinji how the hell he managed more or less get over his problems at the series end, EoTV & EoE. I'd ask Rei why the hell she's so popular and if it is more than good looks (personality) as she told Asuka in After the End . ; I'd also ask her if Rei I really is inside zerogoki and how's it possible if she can only have one soul. Asuka? Um, I guess I'd ask her two things. 1) How the hell was she able to stay more or less so mentally well-adjusted until the series' end. 2) Under just what circumstances would she date "baka Shinji". (Being all alone with him such as after EoE, prehaps?) :twisted: Misato: If she could teach me how to drive and how to be as cool as her. :mrgreen: Yui: If she could adopt me. (What can I say? She's like Super-mom or something!) I wouldn't really ask anything from Kaworu-kun, I'd just hug her and thank her for her decision in 24/24'. (...I don't care if the other Lilim laugh at me, damn it!)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 16, 2006 5:21 pm I think this counts as chit-chat, as much as the Ask Anno thread, at least. I'd ask Kozo whether his love life was indeed el zilcho after Yui, and having worked for the uber-pimp all those years, whether he might want to go on a cathartic pub crawl. @Sailor Star-dust Asuka could keep things together as long as she could keep herself convinced of her own perfection and superiority.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Nov 16, 2006 5:59 pm Mr. Tines wrote: @Sailor Star-dust Asuka could keep things together as long as she could keep herself convinced of her own perfection and superiority.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Fri Nov 17, 2006 12:56 pm I'd ask Yui if she'd marry me...oh wait I'm already married(OH SHI-) I'd ask Asuka if she realy is a redhead I'd ask Rei if she realy is blue haired I'd kick Shinji in the nuts and then ask him, who's his daddy

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 22, 2006 11:46 am I suppose this is under the theoretical circumstances that I am a member of Nerv and in the position of asking these people questions at some point or another. - I'd attempt to approach Gendo for conversation by starting off with "the bullshit", and hopefully getting as far as, "How did you and Yui-san meet?" But I get the feeling that long before that point he would give me an icy look and walk off. So I'd try Fuyutsuki instead -- being a bruinish ol' uncle / sensei type and all. If all went well, we would end up having a convoluted conversation (or conversation s ) about himself, Gendo, Yui, life, things worth being a sardonic bastard about, and bizarre shit like MPB. But eventually he would start looking at me longingly and I would have to go away quietly. I would routinely talk to the Evas -- occasionally gushing with emotion -- at their respective Cages, more than likely to no avail. I would later seek out the Great Yui-sama in Instrumentality and engage in an intimate exchange with my goddess. I would also humbly request that she not go alone and take some souls with her on her journey -- including mine, Gendo's, Kozo's, and Adam's, natch. "You are Eva. It is your destiny to be a Seed, not a mere relic." "You have a point. I knew something about my final speech seemed dodgy." "BTW, they're coming too, aren't they? And I don't mean the boys." "But of course." "Good." After Kaworu arrives, I shall approach her when she is alone. "Are you the Fifth Children?" "..." "Kaworu Nagisa, a.k.a. Tabris." "......" "You hold the soul of the Great Mother Adam." "........." "So does that make you a chick?" :narrows eyes: "Nobody's supposed to know about that." "Fufufu." "And you are?" "A fan. May I have a small moment of your time? :bows: ONEGAI!" "I'm on a tight schedule... but, sure, I guess." - Shinji: Ask him if he needs somebody to talk to, in any capacity. (Or something.) Rei: Attempt to start conversation by asking about, say, those books she reads and what interests her, among other efforts to coax her personality out. Asuka: No idea. I've got this sinking feeling that she'd blow me off. Misato: "Your dad... was he cute? Do you have pics?" (And, uh, more serious things.) Kaji: Random things about life. Maybe sneak in a few questions about his. Maya: "I'm sorry if this seems lewd, Lieutenant, but I'm curious... What are your opinions on human sexuality?" Aoba & Hyuga (separately): "How did a guy like yourself end up in a place like this?" Ritsuko: "What happened to your father?" (And probably other things I'm not considering ATM.) Toji, Kensuke, Hikari: "What happened to your mums?" Keel: "Is 'Keel' your real name?", "So, how did you become a cyborg?", and "Please be honest: Are you gay?"

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Nov 22, 2006 12:00 pm God you're not right! Funny as hell but oh so wrong at the same time.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 22, 2006 12:26 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: God you're not right! Funny as hell but oh so wrong at the same time.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Nov 22, 2006 1:30 pm Trying to talk to Evas . That Fuyutsuki stuff is priceless. And Kaworu, I can't even keep a straight face.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:26 pm I seriously could see that happening with Kaworu. ^^; I like how you'd talk to the Evas. But, when talking to Yui, who's "they"?? Kyoko-sama and Rei-chan (if it's Rei I, she needs a cute name! ; )?? Maya: "I'm sorry if this seems lewd, Lieutenant, but I'm curious... What are your opinions on human sexuality?"

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:44 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: But, when talking to Yui, who's "they"??

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 22, 2006 2:50 pm Reichu wrote: So I'd try Fuyutsuki instead -- being a bruinish ol' uncle / sensei type and all.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Nov 22, 2006 3:13 pm I'd ask Rei if she'd like to go out, 'cause; DAMN. She needs it and I need her.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Wed Nov 22, 2006 9:08 pm Hawt stuff there. Maybe you could play her some Death. I could totally see a metal Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 22, 2006 9:15 pm Hmm...Asuka probably would say that too... -_- But what about talking to them all POST 3I?? ;) (Ah-ha!) If she and Shinji were real (and my age), and seeing as she seems to be obviously straight, I guess I'd ask Shinji if he'd like to go out. (FYI if you think my previous sentence was odd: I'm bi.) Anyway, I could see it like this: Me: "Hiya, Shinji! " Shinji: "Huh? Oh, um...he...hello." Me: "So...since Rei's a clone of your mom and Lilith and all, and Asuka doesn't wanna admit she likes you (yet?), wanna go out sometime?" Shinji, sweating: "Um...uh....wh...what?" *Realization hits him* "Wait a minute, Ayanami's WHAT and Asuka WHAT?! *lets out Ogata Megumi style scream and promptly faints*" Me: *stares* "......." *shrugs* "Meh. Guess I'll try Kaji-san. " Asuka shows up, glaring: :evil: Me: :cry: Crap, I feel like I'm gonna more for Spike Spencer-style Shinji (see Shinji Ikari's FAQ page, here [url]http://www.therossman.com/shinjispage/[/url], for a great example of this ^^; Hehe...a joke about Kaworu-kun being a girl's on there.... :twisted: /irony ) than Ogata Megumi-san style. I'll stop my silliness now. Quote: In terms of Asuka, maybe she'd want to talk if you'd tell her you know were her mother is? "Anta, baka? In that puppet?!? Bugger off, bitch." ":(" "I HATE YOU! I HATE EVERYBODY! I HATE MYSELF THE MOST!" "....."
